examples: And third, he should annul last year's farcical parliamentary elections.
For no man's law, no vow, can annul the commandment and ordinance of God.
Rom. 3:3 For what if some disbelieved? Shall their unbelief annul the faithfulness of God?
Brown filed to annul his marriage to Hynie when he learned of the other marriage.
He has asked the country's Supreme Court to annul the results of the impeachment proceedings.
